scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run build --workspaces --if-present
scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:plugins && npm run test:acceptance
scripts.test:plugins: npm run test --workspace @getanbo/plugin-ministack && npm run test:package --workspace @getanbo/plugin-ministack && npm run test:conformance --workspace @getanbo/plugin-ministack && npm run check --workspace @getanbo/plugin-cloud
scripts.test:acceptance: npm run build && node scripts/acceptance.mjs && node scripts/official-plugins-acceptance.mjs
scripts.test:package: npm pack --dry-run --workspace packages/plugin-sdk && npm pack --dry-run --workspace packages/plugin-testkit && npm pack --dry-run --workspace packages/cli && npm pack --dry-run --workspace plugins/ministack && npm pack --dry-run --workspace plugins/cloud
scripts.typecheck: tsc -b --pretty false && npm run typecheck --workspace @getanbo/plugin-ministack && npm run typecheck --workspace @getanbo/plugin-cloud
